faq_items.q: Is my data stored on your servers?
faq_items.a: No. Your privacy is our priority. Data is not stored on our servers.

faq_items.q: Is this QR code generator really free?
faq_items.a: Yes, QRGENHUB is a **free QR code generator**.

faq_items.q: Can I add a logo to my QR code?
faq_items.a: Absolutely! You can **create QR codes with logo** to enhance your branding.

faq_items.q: Do the QR codes created here expire?
faq_items.a: No, static QR codes generated here have **no expiration date**.

faq_items.q: Is there a limit on how many QR codes I can create?
Which file formats should I choose?
faq_items.a: We recommend **PNG** for web and **SVG** for printing.

faq_items_text.q: What is a text QR code used for?
faq_items_text.a: It stores **messages, notes or instructions** that are displayed instantly when scanned, with no internet connection needed.

faq_items_text.q: Is there a character limit for text QR codes?
faq_items_text.a: You can store up to **4,296 characters** in a static text QR code.

faq_items_text.q: Do I need internet to scan a text QR code?
faq_items_text.a: **No**. The text is encoded directly in the QR code and works completely offline.

faq_items_text.q: Can I create a text QR code for free?
faq_items_text.a: Yes, QRGenHub is **100% free** with no registration or usage limits.
**Never**. They are static and permanent — use them indefinitely.

faq_items_text.q: What are text QR codes used for in practice?
faq_items_text.a: They are used for **product labels, usage instructions, Wi-Fi passwords, business cards** and much more.
